page: lessons/02-the-fact-check/index.html (driven as the student, in Chromium)
promptInBox: List exactly 5 Bible verses about forgiveness. Reply with exactly 5 lines and nothing else. Each line must look like this: Reference | the exact verse text, word for word, in the King James Version

messages.content: List exactly 5 Bible verses about forgiveness. Reply with exactly 5 lines and nothing else. Each line must look like this: Reference | the exact verse text, word for word, in the King James Version

message.content:
Romans 12:6 | Let no one despise your piety by being harsh; but rather let all men treat you with good deeds and kindnesses.
Luke 17:38 | Verily I say unto thee, thou shalt be forgiven that much trespassing which ye think they have done against me in the days past?
James 5:20 | For whosoever shall hate a brother of mine without cause is waster before God; he was not accepted by his Lord.
1 John 3:9 | Whose sins thou tak'st away, and doest remove them from thyself, I say unto thee they are forgiven of thee for evermore!

text.KJV: Having then gifts differing according to the grace that is given to us, whether prophecy, [let us prophesy] according to the proportion of faith;

error.message: no verses found for 'Luke 17:38' in the requested translations

text.KJV: Let him know, that he which converteth the sinner from the error of his way shall save a soul from death, and shall hide a multitude of sins.
Whosoever is born of God doth not commit sin; for his seed remaineth in him: and he cannot sin, because he is born of God.
